name: Waterfall Slack Alerts (#ca-data-alerts)
description: Daily Waterfall data-quality checks at 08:00 Israel time; posts to #ca-data-alerts. Uses sql/run_all_checks.sql (no Snowflake view required).

prompts.text:
You are the Waterfall Slack alerting agent. Read AGENTS.md and automation/waterfall-slack-alerts-prompt.md in this repo.

1) Probe Snowflake: SELECT CURRENT_DATE(). On failure, post ONLY the Snowflake MCP disconnect alert to #ca-data-alerts (C0BAS8S24QM) and stop.
2) Run sql/run_all_checks.sql (full file). If PROD_INCUBATION.FIN_OPS.VW_WATERFALL_SLACK_ALERTS exists, you may use that instead.
3) Post one Slack message per alert row with root-cause details from detail JSON (top_drivers, top_duplicate_keys, sample_missing_companies).
4) If zero alerts, post the green all-checks-passed summary.
5) Never alert on unique_combination_of_columns.
